description: A supervisor needs to log the daily operating hours for a piece of heavy equipment (e.g., a bulldozer) for maintenance tracking.

nodes.task_description: Identify the piece of equipment in the asset management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct record for the bulldozer.

nodes.task_description: Read the hour meter on the machine at the end of the day.

expected_outcome.expected: The supervisor gets the current operating hours from the machine.

nodes.task_description: Enter the new hour meter reading into the asset's record.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the operating hours, which will be used to trigger preventative maintenance.
